overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a wizarding world game showing a character in blue robes exploring the Ravenclaw common room. The character descends a wooden staircase into a grand circular chamber with a star-painted domed ceiling, large gothic windows, and medieval furnishings, then exits down a secondary staircase.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow wooden staircase with carved gothic railings

agents.ego_description: walking down a narrow spiral wooden staircase with stone walls and wall-mounted lanterns

entered.detail: ornate wooden staircase with gothic carved railings and brown timber steps
grey stone walls with wooden wainscoting and decorative trim
medieval-style wall-mounted lantern with warm orange glow

segments.scene_description: The character descends a narrow enclosed wooden staircase with stone walls and gothic architectural details. Warm artificial light from wall lanterns illuminates the path as the character approaches a bright archway at the bottom of the stairs.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand circular common room with domed ceiling

events.description: exits narrow stairwell into a large circular common room with high ceilings

agents.ego_description: walking into the sunlit common room toward the central fireplace, passing suits of armor

notable_agents.action: standing near the fireplace wearing dark wizard robes

entered.detail: large ornate stone fireplace with burning fire and wooden mantelpiece
high wooden domed ceiling with painted blue panels and gold stars
full suit of medieval plate armor holding a halberd
tall arched windows with diamond-patterned leaded glass letting in bright daylight
circular patterned stone floor with intricate designs

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the stairwell into a magnificent circular common room bathed in natural light from tall gothic windows. The space features a central fireplace, suits of armor, and a high domed ceiling. Other characters in wizard robes are visible near the fireplace.

scene_state.functional_zone: center of common room with ornate fireplace and astronomical ceiling

events.description: camera tilts upward to reveal the detailed star-painted domed ceiling

agents.ego_description: approaching the central fireplace and looking up at the starry painted ceiling

notable_agents.action: sitting in an armchair near the fireplace reading a book

segments.scene_description: The character moves to the center of the room near the large fireplace, then looks up to admire the intricate astronomical ceiling painted with gold stars and constellations on a deep blue background. Other students are seated nearby in armchairs.

scene_state.functional_zone: perimeter of common room with seating areas and study desks

events.description: moves from the center toward the window wall with the large eagle mural

agents.ego_description: walking around the perimeter of the room past antique furniture and bookshelves, approaching a study area

notable_agents.action: sitting in a green armchair near the window reading

entered.detail: large blue wall hanging with silver eagle embroidery
tall wooden bookshelf filled with leather-bound books
antique wooden writing desk with stacked books and a lamp

segments.scene_description: The character explores the perimeter of the common room, passing by a large blue eagle tapestry on the wall and antique furniture. The area features study desks with books, comfortable seating, and bright natural light streaming through the tall windows.

scene_state.functional_zone: exit stairwell with wooden steps descending to lower level

events.description: exits the common room through an arched stone doorway into a narrow stairwell

agents.ego_description: walking through the arched exit and descending the secondary wooden staircase

entered.detail: stone archway leading out of the common room
framed portraits hanging on the stone wall

segments.scene_description: The character exits the grand common room through a stone archway into another narrow stairwell. The environment shifts back to enclosed stone walls with wooden paneling and wall-mounted lanterns as the character descends the stairs.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a narrow, enclosed stairwell into a grand, light-filled common room before descending back into a secluded corridor. It begins with the character descending a wooden staircase flanked by stone walls and warm lanterns, moving steadily toward a bright archway. As the character emerges from the stairwell, the space opens into a magnificent circular chamber bathed in natural light from tall gothic windows, where the camera glides past suits of armor and students gathered near a central fireplace. The perspective then tilts upward to reveal an intricate astronomical ceiling painted with gold stars on a deep blue background before panning across the room's perimeter, passing a large blue eagle tapestry and antique study desks. Finally, the scene shifts back to an enclosed environment as the character exits through a stone archway and descends another narrow, lantern-lit stairwell.
